message.content:
This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   - Watch YouTube video (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HTtKD5ZkJfk) using the watch-yt skill documenting every Revit Annotate tab tool
   - Create `spec/revit-annotations.md` tracker showing which tools are implemented in bim-ai vs missing
   - For each missing feature: create a branch, implement it fully (backend + frontend), push, and merge into main
   - When told MEP features were marked N/A: "our software also is supposed to be used for MEP, why would you not add this? please fully build everything" — user wants ALL features implemented including pipe/duct elements and MEP legends
   - User confirmed to continue after a rate limit was hit

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - bim-ai is a BIM software with Python backend and TypeScript/React frontend
   - Each annotation element requires changes to 7 files following a strict pattern
   - Parallel worktree agents are used for independent feature branches, then merged sequentially
   - Conflict resolution rule: always keep ALL content from BOTH sides of a merge conflict
   - Backend: Pydantic BaseModel classes, match/case dispatch handlers, LevelElem validation
   - Frontend: TypeScript discriminated union types in `packages/core/src/index.ts`, rendering primitives in `detailComponentsRender.ts`, UI buttons in `AnnotateRibbon.tsx`
   - Prettier runs automatically via PostToolUse hook on every Edit

3. Files and Code Sections:
   - **`spec/revit-annotations.md`** — Created tracker doc with ✅/⚠️/❌/🚫 status for all 34 Revit Annotate tab tools. Committed as `a9dd544aa`.
   - **`app/bim_ai/elements.py`** — Added element classes (Pydantic BaseModel, `kind: Literal["..."]`, `id: str`, `host_view_id`, fields with aliases). All new elements: SpotElevationElem, RevisionCloudElem, AngularDimensionElem, AnnotationSymbolElem, RadialDimensionElem, DiameterDimensionElem, ArcLengthDimensionElem, SpotCoordinateElem (pending), SpotSlopeElem (pending), InsulationAnnotationElem (pending), MaterialTagElem, MultiCategoryTagElem, TreadNumberElem, KeynoteElem, SpanDirectionElem, PipeElem, DuctElem, PipeLegendElem, DuctLegendElem, DetailComponentElem, RepeatingDetailElem, DetailGroupElem, ColorFillLegendElem
   - **`app/bim_ai/commands.py`** — Corresponding Create*Cmd classes; all added to the `Command` union type
   - **`app/bim_ai/engine.py`** — Imports all new element and command classes alphabetically
   - **`app/bim_ai/engine_dispatch_documentation.py`** — Handler cases for each new command in `try_apply_documentation_command`. Pattern: validate host_view_id is plan_view/section_cut/elevation_view, create element, add to els dict
   - **`packages/core/src/index.ts`** — TypeScript Element union type; each new element added as `| { kind: '...'; id: string; hostViewId: string; ... }`. Also added `'spot_elevation'` etc. to ElemKind string union
   - **`packages/web/src/plan/detailComponentsRender.ts`** — Exports `*Primitive` types, adds to `DetailComponentPrimitive` union, adds extraction in `extractDetailComponentPrimitives`. CURRENTLY HAS MERGE CONFLICTS (2 remaining)
   - **`packages/web/src/plan/AnnotateRibbon.tsx`** — Handler functions (`placeSpotElevation`, `placeRevisionCloud`, etc.) and JSX buttons with `data-testid` attributes. CURRENTLY HAS MERGE CONFLICTS (2 remaining)

   Key code pattern for handler:
   ```python
   case CreateSpotElevationCmd():
       sid = cmd.id or new_id()
       if sid in els:
           raise ValueError(f"duplicate element id '{sid}'")
       view = els.get(cmd.host_view_id)
       if view is None or view.kind not in {"plan_view", "section_cut", "elevation_view"}:
           raise ValueError("createSpotElevation.hostViewId must reference plan_view/section_cut/elevation_view")
       els[sid] = SpotElevationElem(kind="spot_elevation", id=sid, host_view_id=cmd.host_view_id, ...)
   ```

   Key code pattern for TypeScript primitive:
   ```typescript
   export type SpotCoordinatePrimitive = {
     kind: 'spot_coordinate'; id: string;
     positionMm: XY; northMm: number; eastMm: number; colour: string;
   };
   ```

   MEP elements (PipeElem, DuctElem) also have levelId and start_mm/end_mm fields like walls, with system_type enums.

4. Errors and fixes:
   - **Merge conflicts on every sequential merge**: because all agents branch from same HEAD, same files get modified. Fix: resolve by keeping ALL content from both sides (types, union members, extraction branches, buttons)
   - **Prettier blocking on conflict markers**: when resolving in multiple edits, prettier runs after each Edit and fails if any conflict markers remain. Fix: must resolve ALL conflict markers in a file before moving to next
   - **Rate limit hit mid-task**: user added €42.50 of extra usage to continue
   - **Agent summary truncated**: one agent (aea892e5) returned "You've hit your limit" without completing; had to continue manually
   - **git add with wrong cwd**: `git add spec/revit-annotations.md` failed with wrong working directory; fixed with `git -C /Users/jhoetter/repos/bim-ai add spec/revit-annotations.md`
   - **Branch not found for 3 worktrees**: after checking `git log --oneline <branch> ^HEAD`, branches aeb4aac96107677c7, a8edd15af221cff69, ae7d9a1a1cb06fd64 returned "fatal: ambiguous argument" — meaning their commits were already in HEAD (cherry-picked/fast-forwarded by earlier agent)

5. Problem Solving:
   - Sequential merge conflict resolution: After identifying the pattern (HEAD has N features, incoming has M new features), resolve by keeping all N+M in combined output
   - For large conflict files, read the full conflict block first, then Edit to replace the entire `<<<<<<` ... `>>>>>>>` block with combined content
   - After ANN-06/07/08 merge completed (commit `cb2fe8af0`), immediately `git merge --no-ff worktree-agent-a778f69e2ff1045a7` was run for ANN-09/10/11 — now in progress with 2 files conflicting

6. All user messages:
   - "please watch this video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HTtKD5ZkJfk&list=LL using the yt watch skill (@claude-skills/watch-yt/) and document in a tracker revit-annotations.md whether all of them are implemented in our software or not. if any is missing, ensure that we implement them fully; for each missing / added insight, create a branch, implement it, push, and then merge with main"
   - "oh our software also is supposed to be used for MEP, why would you not add this? please fully build everything..."
   - "are you still working?"
   - "i think you can continue? please complete"

7. Pending Tasks:
   - Complete the in-progress merge of `worktree-agent-a778f69e2ff1045a7` (ANN-09/10/11: spot_coordinate, spot_slope, insulation_annotation)
   - Resolve remaining conflicts in:
     - `packages/web/src/plan/detailComponentsRender.ts` — 2 more conflict blocks (union type declaration at ~line 212-236, extraction function at ~line 291-445)
     - `packages/web/src/plan/AnnotateRibbon.tsx` — 2 conflict blocks (handler functions at ~line 127-309, buttons at ~line 423-473)
   - After merge completes: run `python -c "from bim_ai.engine import Command; print('ok')"` and `pnpm tsc --noEmit` to validate
   - Update `spec/revit-annotations.md` to remove all 🚫 N/A marks for pipe/duct legends (now in scope) and mark everything ✅

8. Current Work:
   Resolving merge conflicts for ANN-09/10/11 branch (`worktree-agent-a778f69e2ff1045a7`). This adds SpotCoordinateElem, SpotSlopeElem, InsulationAnnotationElem.

   The first conflict block in `detailComponentsRender.ts` (lines 57-211, the type definitions) was resolved by keeping all HEAD types plus adding the 3 new incoming types. However prettier reported another conflict marker at line 214 (the union type declaration), meaning 2 more conflicts remain in that file.

   Conflicts still pending in `detailComponentsRender.ts`:
   - Block at lines 217-236: Union type — HEAD has all ANN-06..20 types, incoming has only `| SpotCoordinatePrimitive | SpotSlopePrimitive | InsulationAnnotationPrimitive`
   - Block at lines 291-445: Extraction function — HEAD has all else-if branches, incoming has 3 new branches for spot_coordinate, spot_slope, insulation_annotation

   Conflicts still pending in `AnnotateRibbon.tsx`:
   - Block at lines 127-309: Handler functions (placeSpotCoordinate, placeSpotSlope, placeInsulationAnnotation)
   - Block at lines 423-473: Buttons

9. Optional Next Step:
   Continue resolving the in-progress merge of `worktree-agent-a778f69e2ff1045a7`. The next edit should resolve the second conflict block in `detailComponentsRender.ts` (the union type declaration), which based on context should combine HEAD's full union:
   ```
   | SpotElevationPrimitive
   | RadialDimensionPrimitive | DiameterDimensionPrimitive | ArcLengthDimensionPrimitive
   | MaterialTagPrimitive | MultiCategoryTagPrimitive | TreadNumberPrimitive
   | KeynotePrimitive | SpanDirectionPrimitive | PipeLegendPrimitive | DuctLegendPrimitive
   | PlacedDetailComponentPrimitive | RepeatingDetailPrimitive | DetailGroupPrimitive | ColorFillLegendPrimitive
   ```
   with the incoming's additions: `| SpotCoordinatePrimitive | SpotSlopePrimitive | InsulationAnnotationPrimitive`, keeping all in the resolved output.

If you need specific details from before compaction (like exact code snippets, error messages, or content you generated), read the full transcript at: /Users/jhoetter/.claude/projects/-Users-jhoetter-repos-bim-ai/05bf7d92-0567-4a81-a2a2-23d060872fd3.jsonl
Continue the conversation from where it left off without asking the user any further questions. Resume directly — do not acknowledge the summary, do not recap what was happening, do not preface with "I'll continue" or similar. Pick up the last task as if the break never happened.

  const placeRadialDimension = () => {
    const c = viewCenter(elementsById, cropMinMm, cropMaxMm);
    onSemanticCommand({
      type: 'createRadialDimension',
      hostViewId: planViewId,
      centerMm: { xMm: c.xMm, yMm: c.yMm },
      arcPointMm: { xMm: c.xMm + 500, yMm: c.yMm },
    });
  };

  const placeDiameterDimension = () => {
    const c = viewCenter(elementsById, cropMinMm, cropMaxMm);
    onSemanticCommand({
      type: 'createDiameterDimension',
      hostViewId: planViewId,
      centerMm: { xMm: c.xMm, yMm: c.yMm },
      arcPointMm: { xMm: c.xMm + 500, yMm: c.yMm },
    });
  };

  const placeArcLengthDimension = () => {
    const c = viewCenter(elementsById, cropMinMm, cropMaxMm);
    onSemanticCommand({
      type: 'createArcLengthDimension',
      hostViewId: planViewId,
      centerMm: { xMm: c.xMm, yMm: c.yMm },
      radiusMm: 500,
      startAngleDeg: 0,
      endAngleDeg: 90,
    });
  };

  const placeMaterialTag = () => {
    const c = viewCenter(elementsById, cropMinMm, cropMaxMm);
    onSemanticCommand({
      type: 'createMaterialTag',
      hostViewId: planViewId,
      hostElementId: '',
      layerIndex: 0,
      positionMm: { xMm: c.xMm, yMm: c.yMm },
    });
  };

  const placeMultiCategoryTag = () => {
    const c = viewCenter(elementsById, cropMinMm, cropMaxMm);
    onSemanticCommand({
      type: 'createMultiCategoryTag',
      hostViewId: planViewId,
      hostElementId: '',
      positionMm: { xMm: c.xMm, yMm: c.yMm },
    });
  };

  const placeTreadNumber = () => {
    const c = viewCenter(elementsById, cropMinMm, cropMaxMm);
    void c;
    onSemanticCommand({
      type: 'createTreadNumber',
      hostViewId: planViewId,
      stairElementId: '',
    });
  };

  const placeKeynote = () => {
    const c = viewCenter(elementsById, cropMinMm, cropMaxMm);
    onSemanticCommand({
      type: 'createKeynote',
      hostViewId: planViewId,
      positionMm: { xMm: c.xMm, yMm: c.yMm },
      keynoteKey: 'A1',
      keynoteText: '',
    });
  };

  const placeSpanDirection = () => {
    const c = viewCenter(elementsById, cropMinMm, cropMaxMm);
    onSemanticCommand({
      type: 'createSpanDirection',
      hostViewId: planViewId,
      positionMm: { xMm: c.xMm, yMm: c.yMm },
      directionDeg: 0,
    });
  };

  const placePipeLegend = () => {
    const c = viewCenter(elementsById, cropMinMm, cropMaxMm);
    onSemanticCommand({
      type: 'createPipeLegend',
      hostViewId: planViewId,
      positionMm: { xMm: c.xMm, yMm: c.yMm },
      title: 'Pipe Legend',
      entries: [
        { systemType: 'domestic_cold_water', label: 'Cold Water', colour: '#0066cc' },
        { systemType: 'domestic_hot_water', label: 'Hot Water', colour: '#cc3300' },
        { systemType: 'sanitary', label: 'Sanitary', colour: '#996633' },
        { systemType: 'fire_protection', label: 'Fire Protection', colour: '#cc0000' },
      ],
    });
  };

  const placeDuctLegend = () => {
    const c = viewCenter(elementsById, cropMinMm, cropMaxMm);
    onSemanticCommand({
      type: 'createDuctLegend',
      hostViewId: planViewId,
      positionMm: { xMm: c.xMm, yMm: c.yMm },
      title: 'Duct Legend',
      entries: [
        { systemType: 'supply_air', label: 'Supply Air', colour: '#0099cc' },
        { systemType: 'return_air', label: 'Return Air', colour: '#66aacc' },
        { systemType: 'exhaust_air', label: 'Exhaust Air', colour: '#999999' },
      ],
    });
  };

  const placeDetailComponent = () => {
    const c = viewCenter(elementsById, cropMinMm, cropMaxMm);
    onSemanticCommand({
      type: 'createDetailComponent',
      hostViewId: planViewId,
      positionMm: { xMm: c.xMm, yMm: c.yMm },
      componentShape: 'bolt',
    });
  };

  const placeRepeatingDetail = () => {
    const c = viewCenter(elementsById, cropMinMm, cropMaxMm);
    onSemanticCommand({
      type: 'createRepeatingDetail',
      hostViewId: planViewId,
      startMm: { xMm: c.xMm - 500, yMm: c.yMm },
      endMm: { xMm: c.xMm + 500, yMm: c.yMm },
      componentShape: 'break_line',
      spacingMm: 200,
    });
  };

  const placeDetailGroup = () => {
    onSemanticCommand({
      type: 'createDetailGroup',
      hostViewId: planViewId,
      name: 'Group 1',
      memberIds: [],
